message:
fix(section-reference): prevent tooltip flash on initial render

Add check for tooltipLayout.style being populated before rendering
the desktop tooltip. Without this check, the tooltip briefly appears
at position {0,0} before the useLayoutEffect calculates the proper
position, causing a visual flash/jump.

This matches the existing behavior in jargon.tsx.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
